description: 20 predefined click tasks spanning menu bar, buttons, inputs, and screen regions
notes: Each test includes expected X/Y coordinates and ±50px tolerance for pass/fail

tests.name: Chrome dock icon
tests.description: Test clicking app icon in macOS dock (bottom left area)

tests.name: System menu clock
tests.description: Test clicking system clock in menu bar (top right corner)

tests.name: Safari menu item
tests.description: Test clicking 'File' menu in Safari menu bar (top left area)

tests.name: Search button in window
tests.description: Test clicking search button in centered window (mid-screen)

tests.name: Text input field
tests.description: Test clicking text input field in form (center-left area)

tests.name: Submit button
tests.description: Test clicking submit button in form (bottom-center area)

tests.name: Close button (top-right)
tests.description: Test clicking close/X button on window (top-right corner)

tests.name: Settings icon
tests.description: Test clicking settings/gear icon in toolbar (right side)

tests.name: Back button
tests.description: Test clicking back/navigation button (top-left area)

tests.name: Forward button
tests.description: Test clicking forward/navigation button (top-left area, right of back)

tests.name: Reload button
tests.description: Test clicking reload/refresh button (top-center area)

tests.name: Address bar
tests.description: Test clicking address/URL bar (top-center prominent area)

tests.name: Tab in tab bar
tests.description: Test clicking tab in browser tab bar (top area)

tests.name: Menu button (hamburger)
tests.description: Test clicking hamburger/menu button (top-right area)

tests.name: Sidebar item
tests.description: Test clicking item in left sidebar (left-center area)

tests.name: Main content area
tests.description: Test clicking in main content area (center-center region)

tests.name: Floating action button
tests.description: Test clicking floating action button (bottom-right area)

tests.name: Dialog confirm button
tests.description: Test clicking confirm button in dialog/modal (center area)

tests.name: Dialog cancel button
tests.description: Test clicking cancel button in dialog/modal (center area, left of confirm)

tests.name: Notification dismiss
tests.description: Test clicking dismiss button on notification (top-right area)
